title: QUIC package cold-handshake pilot
scope: A proposed profile for reviewing package-local mapping and evidence behavior around the cold-handshake scenario.
nonGoals: It is not a complete RFC 9000 profile.
It is not a QUIC conformance score or certification surface.
It does not declare that an executor currently supports the scenario.
applicabilityAssumptions: A future selected executor negotiates QUIC version 1 and emits the mapped check outcomes.
